pet_notes: Tiny gothic-cute void creature; velvet black plush fur; glowing magenta fissures; huge violet dying-star eyes; small bat wings with broken butterfly and rose markings; silver spike collar; compact body; raised-fist punk attitude; cute but dangerous.
style_notes: Premium plush dark-fantasy mascot, readable at small pet size, no scenery, no text, clean silhouette, high contrast violet and magenta accents.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `plush`: Soft plush toy mascot with rounded stitched forms, fuzzy fabric feel, simple sewn details, and readable toy-like proportions. User style notes: Premium plush dark-fantasy mascot, readable at small pet size, no scenery, no text, clean silhouette, high contrast violet and magenta accents..
